message:
fix: underflow prevention and TOCTOU race in session cleanup

huh/src/lib.rs:
- Fix potential underflow in Select/MultiSelect offset calculations
- Changed self.height - 1 to self.height.saturating_sub(1) in 5 places
- Prevents panic if height is 0 (edge case in terminal resize)

wish/src/session/manager.rs:
- Fix TOCTOU race condition in start_cleanup_task()
- Previously: read lock to check, then write lock to set (race window)
- Now: single write lock for entire check-and-set operation
- Prevents duplicate cleanup tasks being spawned

harmonica/src/spring.rs:
- Remove redundant debug_assert (n > 0 already guarded by if)
- Use f64::from(n) instead of n as f64 (clearer intent)

guided_tour.rs:
- Code formatting only (break long method chains)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
